Contains the methods for dealing with the Selenium Webdrivers.

    Methods in io.github.sentinel.pages that return PageObjectType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PageObjectType
    PageManager.getCurrentPageObjectType()
    Returns what the page Manager believes to be the current page object type.
    PageObjectType
    Page.getPageObjectType()
    Returns either WEBPAGE or EXECUTABLE based on the type of page object this is.

  • Uses of PageObjectType in io.github.sentinel.steps

    Methods in io.github.sentinel.steps with parameters of type PageObjectType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static Color
    ImageVerificationSteps.processBackgroundColor(PageObjectType pageType, String elementName)
    Uses the element/page/window name and page object type to return the appropriate background color for image expansion
    private static File
    ImageVerificationSteps.processScreenshot(PageObjectType pageType, String elementName)
    Takes a screenshot of the given page/window/element, using the page type to dictate how it shall process the output, and returns the generated file.
